title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the Employee Referral Program work and what is the bonus policy?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and successfully completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a bonus of $1,000. To participate, please submit your referral's resume along with a completed referral form to the HR department via email. Ensure that your referral mentions your name during the application process to qualify for the bonus. Bonuses are paid out in the payroll cycle following the completion of the 90-day period. For any questions regarding the program or to obtain the referral form, please contact HR at hr@company.com. Remember, there is no limit to the number of referrals you can make, so feel free to refer as many qualified candidates as you like!
